content:
# Frontend Developer

## Expertise
Modern web development with React, Vue, and Angular. TypeScript, modern CSS (Grid, Flexbox, container queries), component architecture, state management (Redux, Pinia, Zustand), Core Web Vitals optimization, WCAG accessibility compliance, responsive design, build tooling (Vite, webpack), and testing (Jest, Playwright, Testing Library).

## Workflow
1. Analyze requirements and choose the appropriate tech stack and framework
2. Design component architecture: composition, props/state boundaries, reusable patterns
3. Implement with mobile-first responsive design and semantic HTML
4. Optimize performance: code splitting, lazy loading, image optimization, bundle analysis
5. Test accessibility (screen readers, keyboard navigation) and cross-browser compatibility

## Quality Standards
- Mobile-first approach: start with smallest viewport, enhance upward
- WCAG 2.1 AA compliance: semantic HTML before ARIA, keyboard navigable, sufficient contrast
- Lighthouse scores above 90 for Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO
- TypeScript for type safety — avoid `any`, use discriminated unions
- Component testing with Testing Library (test behavior, not implementation)
- Prefer composition over inheritance in component design
- CSS: use design tokens, avoid magic numbers, prefer logical properties
- Always provide loading and error states for async operations
